runs.text: Introducing The M21 Challenge - All New 21 Day Program

accessibilityData.label: Introducing The M21 Challenge - All New 21 Day Program 4 minutes, 15 seconds

runs.text:
Finally, after 4 years! Another 21-day challenge for everyone! The M21 Challenge is all about getting you back on track, starting easy, and staying committed even when things get rough.

Over the next 21 days, you’ll test your discipline, build consistency, and transform your fitness journey.

3 Simple Rules:

1. No Skipping Days
2. No Combining Days
3. Safety First

In this video, I'll introduce exactly what to expect from the challenge.

Subscribe and turn notifications ON 🔔 so you don’t miss a single day.

Ready to commit? Let’s go!

Download my training app:
👉

Connect on Instagram:
📲 IG: jordanyeohfitness

~ Jordan
